text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final stop of the Triple Tiara, the Shuka Sho,
is here. Mejiro Dober is so focused, even the
cheers of the crowd don't faze her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the race, Mejiro Dober passionately
declares that she will show everyone just how
much she's improved in the Triple Tiara!
